results.title: UK leaks Trump's Iran war plan? Repeats this move seen before 28 Feb strikes US-Israeli strikes
results.description: After Trump publicly pressures Andy Burnham, the UK is pulling embassy staff out of Tehran and warning against all travel to Iran, Afghanistan, Iraq and Balochistan. This video asks if London is quietly leaking details of Washington’s Iran invasion planning to signal discomfort with escalation—even as it lets U.S. forces use British bases for strikes.

results.title: RU student begins hunger strike over lathi-charge on protesters in Delhi
results.description: RU student begins hunger strike over lathi-charge on protesters in Delhi

results.title: ‘Absolute Insanity!’ CNN Data Guru Says Americans ‘Hate, Hate, Hate’ Trump’s New Tariffs
results.description: CNN's Harry Enten declared President Donald Trump is so underwater when it comes to public approval of his tariffs that he might as well be the "Little Mermaid." The post ‘Absolute Insanity!’ CNN Data Guru Says Americans ‘Hate, Hate, Hate’ Trump’s New Tariffs first appeared on Mediaite .

results.title: Trump says Iran will be held responsible for Houthi attacks in Red Sea
results.description: Mr Trump, in a post on Truth Social, said the Yemen rebel group is a “proxy of Iran,” and its actions against US allies in the Gulf will be considered an Iranian attack by extension. The post Trump says Iran will be held responsible for Houthi attacks in Red Sea appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria .

results.title: Khader targets Centre over NEET issue
results.description: The minister demanded the resignation of the Union Education Minister, saying the controversy warranted political accountability.
